task_updates.executor_notes: Extended `Sharer.send_tweet` with optional `in_reply_to_tweet_id` and forwarded it into `post_tweet` while keeping the existing `(success, tweet_url)` return unchanged. To stay consistent with the user’s attachment waiver, removed the sharer-layer no-media rejection so text-only tweets can proceed; the existing failure path remains in place when media was requested but every download failed. Verified by compiling `src/features/sharing/sharer.py`.
